text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, computers can create art, compose music, and even write stories or poems. For example, AI programs can paint pictures in minutes or make original songs by learning from thousands of examples. Some people worry that machines might replace human artists. However, while AI can copy patterns and produce new combinations, it doesn’t feel emotions or have personal experiences. Human creativity often comes from joy, sadness, or inspiration—things a machine cannot truly understand. So, rather than competing, AI can be a helpful tool for artists. It can suggest ideas, save time, or help people who struggle to express themselves. In the end, the most creative results still come from human imagination.
